description: Informal note related to business matters. Probably sent from Fustat. In Arabic script. The sender instructs the addressee to acquire a blue Dustarī (=Tustarī) fabric suitable for mattresses (ṭarrāḥāt) and either to bring it himself (fa-in kāna laka ṣuʿūd ṣaʿidta bihi) or to send it back with the bearer of the letter. The postscript in ll. 11–13 refers to another commodity, possibly al-ṭarz al-anṭākī (embroidery of Antioch). YU/ASE
description_he: מכתב בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
